text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you helping shape our community events!
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a Mentor. We're so glad to have your expertise and guidance in our community!
